steps.title: Use list values for x and y
steps.content: For multivariable equivalent-expression questions, a fast Desmos check is to plug in several ordered pairs. Use $x_1=[1,2,3]$ and $y_1=[1,2,4]$, then evaluate the original expression as a list.

steps.title: Compare the answer choices
steps.content: Now evaluate each answer choice on the same lists. The list for choice B matches the original list exactly; the others produce different values.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice B is $(12x^2+y^2)(x+5y)$, and it matches the original expression for every tested pair. Choice B is correct.
